title: 84th anniversary for Navy Seabee's
author: SGT N.McEnheimer
excerpt: Celebrating the 84th anniversary of the Navy Seabees and their legacy of service.
body: Today we recognize the 84th anniversary of the Navy Seabees. Their history of construction, combat support, and expeditionary service remains one of the great examples of adaptability and professionalism in military history.

title: Recent Platoon Sergeant Selections
author: 1SG V.Garcia
excerpt: Leadership changes announced across line platoons following recent evaluations.
body: Following recent evaluations and operations, new platoon sergeant selections have been finalized. These leadership adjustments are intended to improve continuity, standards enforcement, and mission execution across the company.

title: Medical Qualification Course
author: SPC P.Perez
excerpt: Upcoming course cycle opens for members pursuing the unit's medical specialization path.
body: Enrollment is now open for the next Medical Qualification Course. Members interested in advancing into the medic track should review prerequisites and coordinate with leadership for slot assignment.

title: Land Navigation Course #26-01
author: SFC G.Nagy
excerpt: Course announcement covering map reading, route planning, and practical land nav standards.
body: Land Navigation Course 26-01 will focus on route planning, terrain association, pace count, and checkpoint validation. Members are expected to arrive with required equipment and prior preparation completed.

title: Graduates of OSUT Class #26-08
author: MAJ J.LaFlash
excerpt: Recognizing the newest graduates completing initial entry training in the unit.
body: Congratulations to the members of OSUT Class 26-08. Their graduation marks the successful completion of the unit's initial training standards and qualification pipeline.
